_removed_reason: ('42S22', "[42S22] [Microsoft][ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server][SQL Server]無效的資料行名稱 'dtlCostStd'。 (207) (SQLExecDirectW)")

question: Which product numbers have an average initial cost greater than 50?
query: SELECT pNo FROM WP_vOutStockUnion WHERE isDel = 'N' AND dtlIsDel = 'N' GROUP BY pNo HAVING AVG(costInitial) > 50
